errors.message: The activity identifier should begin with your IATI organisation identifier (either the current IATI Organisation identifier for the reporting organisation or a previous version included in other-identifier element) followed by a unique string for the activity separated by a hyphen

context.text: For prefix: /iati-activities/iati-activity/reporting-org/@ref = 'BE-BCE_KBO-0445741823' at line: 6, column: 34 and /iati-activities/iati-activity/iati-identifier = 'NP-IRD-qareg1-17' at line: 5, column: 5

ruleInfo.message: The activity identifier should begin with your IATI organisation identifier (either the current IATI Organisation identifier for the reporting organisation or a previous version included in other-identifier element) followed by a unique string for the activity separated by a hyphen
